title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
